name: Lemon Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the whipping cream and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks.
3. Stir in the sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk), lemon juice, and yellow food coloring if desired.
4. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
5. Pour into a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan or other 2-quart container.
6. Cover and freeze for at least 6 hours or until firm.
7. Serve with warm blueberry 'n' spice sauce.
